godot_hook_investigation.note: Investigation only; external/godot-master is NOT modified. Paths and functions are recorded for the patch 0011 call-site gate and later native-handle mapping.

effect_class.native_pass_shape: raster fullscreen fragment pass (writes p_dst_framebuffer), NOT a compute dispatch

call_sites.note: can_use_storage leg: tone_mapper->tonemapper(color_texture, dest_fb, tonemap); patch 0011 gates this call. The tonemapper_mobile leg (L828) is not wired.

godot_hook_investigation.dest_resource: dest_fb render-target framebuffer (or intermediate Tonemapper/destination texture when a spatial upscaler / SMAA follows)

descriptor_mapping.dst_shape: dst extent == src extent (1:1 full-resolution tonemap; contrast with GRX-009's max(source / 8, 1) reduce shape)

supported_math_subset.white: carried in b0 for TonemapPushConstant shape parity; unused by LINEAR

known_gaps: no auto exposure (source_auto_exposure texture leg unmapped)
no FXAA, no BCS, no color correction (1D/3D LUT), no debanding
SDR convert_to_srgb=true leg only; HDR output (convert_to_srgb=false) unsupported
sRGB output is not clamped to [0,1] (native path relies on framebuffer quantization)
raster-vs-compute output seam: Godot writes the LDR result via a fullscreen fragment pass; this kernel writes a full-res UAV
GPU-side math parity observation pending a real dispatch (math_parity_evidence.json)

compile_blockers.summary: the canonical tonemap package is the owner-approved hlsl_bridge_workaround artifact (DXC cs_6_0 container validated by dxv, per-slot texture2d/rwtexture2d binding kinds, Rurix-owned RTS0; GRX-009 texture_artifact_provenance_policy.json applies to every texture compute pass); a rurixc-owned tonemap compile still requires a patched llc that supports texture intrinsics plus float4 texture element support in the Rurix Texture2D<F>/RWTexture2D<F> lang items

implementation_status.runtime_state_note: The DEFAULT runtime path stays fallback-only: with all per-pass settings at their false defaults the bridge still returns RXGD_STATUS_FALLBACK for RXGD_PASS_TONEMAP and the native Godot tonemapper renders. real_gpu_pass=true / real_d3d12_dispatch_recorded=true record the strict MEASURED success of the opt-in real-pass arm (dispatch_real_pass under a d3d12-recording-shim bridge on the 0001..0013 scratch build); it is not a default enablement and carries no performance claim. The shipping feature-off bridge still fails closed with real_dispatch_path_not_linked, and the patch 0013 result writeback is a SCAFFOLD (native Godot tonemapper stays the continuation/backstop). No estimated tonemap GPU time is attributed.
implementation_status.bridge_gate: src/rurix-godot TonemapGate: preflight (int64 cap, 2 texture resources, 28-byte b0, dims match, 1:1 dst shape) -> dispatch eligibility (RXGD_CAP_TONEMAP_REAL_PASS opt-in, non-null native handles, TonemapDispatchPackage layout/digest match vs offline evidence) -> per-slot kernel-binding-kind conformance ([texture2d, rwtexture2d]) -> math-parity gate (linear_srgb_cpu_reference_proven_pending_gpu_dispatch) -> real dispatch only under the d3d12-recording-shim feature; every failure records a fallback reason and prints the once-per-session RXGD_TONEMAP_REAL_PASS_BLOCKED diagnostic
implementation_status.godot_module_patch: spike/godot-rurix/patches/0011-rurix-accel-tonemap-pass-gate-and-callsite.patch (stacked on 0001..0010; default-false rendering/rurix_accel/passes/tonemap/enabled setting, try_record_tonemap() module gate, default-false virtual D3D12Hooks::try_record_tonemap(), and the Tonemap call-site opt-in gate in renderer_scene_render_rd.cpp; the native tonemapper path is always preserved as fallback)

wired_call_sites.note: opt-in gate calls D3D12Hooks::try_record_tonemap() before the native tone_mapper->tonemapper(...) on the can_use_storage leg (patch 0011; applyability verified via git apply --check on a scratch copy)

standalone_d3d12_dispatch_smoke.purpose: Prove the tracked offline tonemap DXIL container + RTS0 root signature + descriptor layout can complete one minimal compute dispatch on a real D3D12 device/command queue AND that the measured GPU texel matches the CPU reference (linear_to_srgb(src * luminance_multiplier * exposure)) within tolerance. Standalone measured evidence only; the bridge records no dispatch and returns no OK.
does_not_imply: any visual diff, measured fallback telemetry, or performance claim

real_pass_measured_success.real_gpu_pass_scope: opt_in_only: the measured real dispatch requires the default-false dispatch_real_pass arm plus a d3d12-recording-shim bridge DLL; the default runtime path stays fallback-only and the shipping feature-off bridge fails closed with real_dispatch_path_not_linked
real_pass_measured_success.writeback: patch 0013 result writeback scaffold: the LINEAR + linear_to_srgb result is dispatched into the real Godot tonemap destination resource while the native Godot tonemapper still runs as continuation/backstop, so the image cannot change and no net benefit exists yet

remaining_segments: HDR output (convert_to_srgb=false) beyond the SDR sRGB-only subset
raster-vs-compute output seam design (native path writes the LDR result via a fullscreen fragment pass; this kernel writes a full-res UAV)
per-pass FPS baseline comparison (contract requires >= 0.95x baseline before any default-enable discussion)

rd_native.summary: GRX Route B tonemap rd_native is a SEPARATE, bridge-independent in-frame real-replacement path from the shim/rxgd path documented above. It drives the main RenderingDevice directly (shader_create_from_bytecode -> compute_pipeline_create -> compute_list) so the Rurix tonemap kernel runs as a first-class in-frame compute pass; when it records, the native Godot tonemapper is GENUINELY SKIPPED (not a scaffold). It uses no rxgd session, sets no RxGdCaps.flags bit, and does not change any shim-path field of this manifest (godot_runtime_tonemap_path_enabled stays false; the shim RXGD_CAP_TONEMAP_REAL_PASS bit 4 is unrelated).

backend_states.1: shim (nominal; existing shim path governed by its own four settings)
backend_states.2: rd_native (engage the in-frame RD-native compute replacement)

rd_native.patch_stack: 0001-0029 + 0040 (branch-HEAD gpu_culling culling tail; the culling 0027-0029 and fused 0036-0038 tails are mutually exclusive under strict git apply, so the combined 0001-0029+0036-0038+0040 stack is not applyable with the frozen patches)
rd_native.hook_virtual: D3D12Hooks::try_record_tonemap_rd_native(RID p_source_color, RID p_dest_color, Size2i p_source_size, Size2i p_dest_size, float p_exposure, float p_white, float p_luminance_multiplier)
rd_native.descriptor_mapping: same as the shim path: t0 SRV src_color (UNIFORM_TYPE_TEXTURE), u0 UAV dst_color (UNIFORM_TYPE_IMAGE), 28-byte b0 [i64 source_width, i64 source_height, f32 exposure, f32 white, f32 luminance_multiplier], dispatch ceil(dest/8)
rd_native.kernel_subset: linear + linear_to_srgb (tonemap_mode LINEAR); the candidate scene is pinned to LINEAR to align with this subset boundary. Reinhard/Filmic/ACES/AgX, auto exposure, glow, FXAA, BCS, color correction, debanding, multiview, and HDR output are OUT of the rd_native subset and route to the native path.

container.path_relative_note: injected via an absolute rd_container_path (staged copy of spike/godot-rurix/rd-native-pipeline/out/tonemap.rd_container.bin); byte-identical to the container proven at ~1 ULP in the S2 probe (rd_native_probe_evidence.json)

enablement.measured_note: On the 0001-0029+0040 scratch Godot (Windows D3D12 Forward+, RTX 4070 Ti): the candidate leg (backend=2 + S2-proven container) printed RXGD_RD_NATIVE_TONEMAP active (rd_native engaged; native tonemapper skipped by construction) and its captured frame is BYTE-IDENTICAL to the native LINEAR reference (LDR max_abs=0/mean_abs=0) = the first real-replacement picture evidence. The fail_closed leg (backend=2 + garbage container) measured RenderingDevice rejecting the container and fell back to the native tonemapper byte-identically to the reference. Three consecutive captured frames per leg were byte-stable.

remaining_rounds: raster-vs-compute output-seam / multi-tone (non-flat) full-frame parity characterization
additional tonemapper modes + exposure/glow/HDR beyond the LINEAR subset
rd_native for the other post passes (taa/ssao/particles) as 0041+ slices
per-pass FPS baseline (contract requires >= 0.95x baseline before any default-enable discussion)

evidence_requirements.visual: in-engine LDR absolute diff (GRX-009 segment 4g template) recorded by the real-pass enablement smoke: reference (disabled) vs candidate (opt-in real pass) vs forced-fallback frames, all within the pinned thresholds (max_abs<=2, mean_abs<=0.25)
evidence_requirements.perf: reuse GRX-006 baseline/perf gate; no perf improvement claimed

disclaimer: GRX-010 tonemap is closed out at the stage-A5-equivalent level: the tonemap pass contract, the DXC/DXV/RTS0 offline kernel package (hlsl_bridge_workaround provenance, runtime-mappable per the owner-approved GRX-009 texture artifact provenance policy), the fail-closed bridge TonemapGate (default RXGD_STATUS_FALLBACK; opt-in RXGD_CAP_TONEMAP_REAL_PASS arm), the Godot patch stack 0001..0013 (per-pass settings default false, runtime resource binding, recording smoke + real-pass opt-in; native tonemap path always preserved), the standalone real D3D12 dispatch smoke, and the gated real-pass enablement gate that recorded a strict MEASURED success (real_pass_enablement_success_evidence.json). implemented=true / real_gpu_pass=true / real_d3d12_dispatch_recorded=true record the MEASURED opt-in real-pass arm only. The DEFAULT path stays fallback-only, default_enable_state stays disabled per the owner decision (real_pass_default_enable_decision.json, keep_default_disabled), the shipping feature-off bridge still fails closed with real_dispatch_path_not_linked, the patch 0013 writeback is a SCAFFOLD (native Godot tonemapper continuation/backstop), and NO visual-superiority, GPU-timestamp, FPS, or performance improvement is claimed.
